assay: 10x Chromium Single Cell 5′ Gene Expression v2 (Dual Index)

oligos.name: Single Cell 5' Gel Bead oligo
oligos.role: Bead-bound capture/barcoding oligo; carries partial Read 1, cell barcode, UMI and the template switch oligo used for 5' template switching
oligos.notes: Appendix Step 1.5: 5'-CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT-N16-N10-TTTCTTATATrGrGrG-3'. rGrGrG folded to GGG. 13 nt TSO base-pairs with the untemplated C's added by RT at the transcript 5' end.

oligos.name: Poly-dT RT Primer
oligos.role: Reverse transcription primer that anneals to the mRNA poly(A) tail and primes first-strand cDNA synthesis
oligos.notes: PN-2000007. Appendix Step 1.5. 30 T's followed by a VN anchor.

oligos.name: cDNA Forward Primer
oligos.role: Forward primer for bulk cDNA amplification; anneals to the partial TruSeq Read 1 handle

oligos.name: cDNA Reverse Primer
oligos.role: Reverse primer for bulk cDNA amplification; anneals to the poly-dT RT primer handle

oligos.name: Illumina TruSeq Read 1 primer
oligos.role: Read 1 sequencing primer; reads the 16 nt cell barcode + 10 nt UMI
oligos.notes: Full TruSeq Read 1 introduced by the P5/i5 index primer (Appendix Step 5.5).

oligos.name: Illumina TruSeq Read 2 primer
oligos.role: Read 2 sequencing primer; reads the cDNA insert (transcript 5' end)
oligos.notes: Standard Illumina TruSeq Read 2 primer; its binding site (GTGACTGGAGTTCAGACGTGT partial) is introduced by the P7/i7 index primer and the ligated Read 2 adapter (Appendix Steps 5.3, 5.5).

oligos.name: Adaptor Oligos (TruSeq Read 2 adapter)
oligos.role: Double-stranded forked adapter ligated to A-tailed cDNA fragments; provides the TruSeq Read 2 priming site
oligos.notes: Adaptor Oligos PN-2000094. Appendix: 5'-GATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCAC-3' / 3'-TCTAGCCTTCTCG-5' (bottom written 5'->3' = GCTCTTCCGATCT).

oligos.name: Sample Index PCR Forward Primer (P5 / i5)
oligos.role: Dual Index PCR forward primer; adds P5 and the i5 sample index and completes TruSeq Read 1
oligos.notes: Dual Index Kit TT Set A PN-1000215, Appendix Step 5.5.

oligos.name: Sample Index PCR Reverse Primer (P7 / i7)
oligos.role: Dual Index PCR reverse primer; adds P7 and the i7 sample index and the TruSeq Read 2 priming site
oligos.notes: Dual Index Kit TT Set A PN-1000215, Appendix Step 5.5.

oligos.name: Illumina P5 adapter
oligos.role: P5 flow-cell binding sequence at the 5' end of the final library
oligos.notes: Introduced via the Sample Index PCR forward primer.

oligos.name: Illumina P7 adapter
oligos.role: P7 flow-cell binding sequence at the 3' end of the final library
oligos.notes: Introduced via the Sample Index PCR reverse primer. In the final-library top strand the P7 end appears as its reverse complement ATCTCGTATGCCGTCTTCTGCTTG.

final_library.source_label: Chromium Single Cell 5' Gene Expression Dual Index Library (CG000331 Rev F, Appendix Step 5.5)

evidence.locator: Chromium Single Cell 5' Gene Expression Dual Index Library (CG000331 Rev F, Appendix Step 5.5)

library_generation.title: GEM generation & barcoding
library_generation.summary: Cells, barcoded 5' gel beads and RT reagents (poly-dT RT primer) are co-partitioned into nanoliter GEMs on Chromium Next GEM Chip K.
library_generation.note: Each gel bead carries ~750,000-member-pool oligos with a common 16 nt 10x barcode: partial Read 1 + barcode + UMI + a 13 nt TSO ending in rGrGrG. The poly-dT RT primer is supplied in the master mix. Bead dissolution releases the oligos into the droplet with lysed-cell mRNA.
library_generation.product:
Co-partitioned in one GEM:

Gel bead oligo:
|--5'- CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT[CELL_BARCODE:16][UMI:10]TTTCTTATATGGG -3'

Poly-dT RT primer annealed to mRNA poly(A):
5'- AAGCAGTGGTATCAACGCAGAGTAC(T)30VN -3'
                      3'- ...(A)n-mRNA-5'cap

library_generation.title: Reverse transcription & template switching (GEM-RT)
library_generation.summary: MMLV RT extends the poly-dT primer along the mRNA, adds untemplated C's at the 5' cap, then template-switches onto the bead TSO, appending the barcode/UMI/Read 1 to the transcript 5' end.
library_generation.note: Incubation 53 C/45 min then 85 C/5 min produces 10x-barcoded, full-length first-strand cDNA. The 5' end of every transcript now carries the cell barcode, UMI and partial Read 1 sequence.
library_generation.product:
Barcoded first-strand cDNA after template switch (sense orientation shown):
5'- CTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT[CELL_BARCODE:16][UMI:10]TTTCTTATATGGG[CDNA]GTACTCTGCGTTGATACCACTGCTT -3'
3'- GATGTGCTGCGAGAAGGCTAGA[CELL_BARCODE:16][UMI:10]AAAGAATATACCC[CDNA]CATGAGACGCAACTATGGTGACGAA -5'

library_generation.title: cDNA amplification (PCR)
library_generation.summary: After silane cleanup, barcoded cDNA is PCR-amplified with the cDNA Forward (partial Read 1) and cDNA Reverse (RT handle) primers.
library_generation.note: Generates sufficient double-stranded, full-length cDNA mass to build the 5' gene expression library (and optionally V(D)J libraries from the same material).

library_generation.title: Fragmentation, End Repair & A-tailing
library_generation.summary: Amplified cDNA is enzymatically fragmented and A-tailed to optimize amplicon size for 5' GEX library construction.
library_generation.note: Only fragments retaining the barcoded 5' (Read 1) end carry the cell barcode/UMI and go on to amplify in Sample Index PCR; internal fragments lack the Read 1 handle.

library_generation.title: Adaptor ligation
library_generation.summary: The forked TruSeq Read 2 adapter (Adaptor Oligos) is ligated to the A-tailed fragment ends.
library_generation.note: Adds the TruSeq Read 2 priming site to the fragmented (3') end of the barcoded amplicon.

library_generation.title: Sample Index PCR
library_generation.summary: Dual Index TT Set A primers add P5 + i5 and P7 + i7, completing TruSeq Read 1/Read 2 and yielding the final Illumina library.
library_generation.note: P5, P7, and the 10 bp i5/i7 sample indices are added by PCR; the final library begins with P5 and ends with P7 and is ready for paired-end dual-index sequencing.

library_sequencing.note: Primer anneals to the bottom strand at the TruSeq Read 1 region and reads the 16 nt 10x cell barcode followed by the 10 nt UMI.
library_sequencing.diagram:
Read 1 sequencing primer
             5'- ACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTCTTCCGATCT---------------------------->
                 |||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
3'- ...GATCTACAC TGTGAGAAAGGGATGTGCTGCGAGAAGGCTAGA NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN NNNNNNNNNN AAAGAATATACCC... -5'
                                                  <---16 nt 10x BC---><-10 nt UMI->
                                                        (template = bottom strand)

library_sequencing.primer: i7 index sequencing primer (binds the TruSeq Read 2 adapter, 5'-AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCAC-3')
library_sequencing.note: Reads the 10 bp i7 sample index; primer anneals to the top-strand Read 2 adapter and extends into the i7 index using the bottom strand as template.
library_sequencing.diagram:
i7 index sequencing primer
5'- ...AGATCGGAAGAGCACACGTCTGAACTCCAGTCAC---------->
       ||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||||
3'- ...TCTAGCCTTCTCGTGTGCAGACTTGAGGTCAGTG NNNNNNNNNN TAGAGCATACGGCAGAAGACGAAC -5'
                                         <-i7 (10)->
                                         (template = bottom strand)

library_sequencing.primer: i5 index sequencing primer (binds the TruSeq Read 1 region, forward-strand workflow)
library_sequencing.note: Reads the 10 bp i5 sample index. On forward-strand instruments (MiSeq, HiSeq 2500, NovaSeq 6000 standard) the primer reads the i5 as shown; on reverse-complement workflow instruments (NextSeq, NovaSeq Xp) the i5 is reported as its reverse complement.
library_sequencing.diagram:
5'- AATGATACGGCGACCACCGAGATCTACAC NNNNNNNNNN ACACTCTTTCCCTACACGACGCTC... -3'
                                             ||||||||||||||||||||||||
                       <---i5 (10)---------- GAGCGTCGTGTAGGGAAAGAGTGT -5'
                                          3' i5 index sequencing primer
                                             (template = top strand)

library_sequencing.note: Primer anneals to the top-strand Read 2 adapter and extends leftward, reading the cDNA insert (5' end of the transcript).

title: 10x Chromium Single Cell 5′ Gene Expression v2 (Dual Index)
description: A droplet-based single-cell 5′ gene expression assay. Cells are co-partitioned with barcoded gel beads into GEMs; a poly(dT) RT primer primes reverse transcription of polyadenylated mRNA, and MMLV reverse transcriptase template-switches onto a bead-bound template switch oligo (TSO), attaching a 16 nt 10x cell barcode, a 10 nt UMI and the Illumina Read 1 sequence to the 5′ end of each transcript. Read 1 (26 cycles) recovers the cell barcode + UMI, while Read 2 (90 cycles) reads the cDNA insert from the 5′ end of the transcript; dual i7/i5 sample indices (10 bp each) permit multiplexing. The final construct is a standard Illumina paired-end library flanked by P5 and P7.

original_publication.title: Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 5' Reagent Kits v2 (Dual Index) User Guide

authors.name: 10x Genomics, Inc.
authors.affiliation: 6230 Stoneridge Mall Road, Pleasanton, CA 94588 USA

throughput.summary: 500-10,000 cells per sample; ~1,700 cells loaded recovers ~1,000 cells at ~0.8% multiplet rate.

data_processing.summary: Sequencing produces a standard Illumina BCL folder that is processed with Cell Ranger: FASTQs are generated with cellranger mkfastq, reads are aligned and demultiplexed by 10x Barcode/UMI into a feature-barcode count matrix, and cells are clustered; running the GEX library together with V(D)J via cellranger multi improves cell calling. Results are visualized in Loupe Browser (t-SNE/UMAP).
